name: HMS Veleta (T 130)
events: 1 Jul 1941 HMS Otway (Lt.Cdr.(Retd.) J.R.G. Harvey, RN) arrived at Oban. She departed for Rothesay later the same day escorted by the A/S trawler HMS Veleta (T/Lt. R.C. Heron, RNVR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
